Welcome

Legacy Plumbing

Legacy Plumbing has been serving Atlanta and the surrounding region with premium plumbing services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Atlanta Trusts Legacy Plumbing

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →
Affiliations & Certifications
What We Do

Our Services

Water Heater Services

Drain Cleaning

Pipe Repair & Replacement

Georgia's expansive red clay causes more pipe movement than most regions, leading to leaks at joints and stress fracture...

Bathroom Remodeling

Atlanta's mix of historic charm and modern living creates unique bathroom plumbing challenges. We help homeowners preser...

Leak Detection

Undetected leaks in Atlanta homes can lead to foundation issues and mold growth in our humid climate. Our advanced detec...
Our Difference

The Benefits of Choosing Legacy Plumbing

Contact Us →
“
When a pipe burst in our 1930s Ansley Park home during last January's freeze, Legacy had a team here in 45 minutes. They not only fixed the immediate issue but showed me where other vulnerable spots were in our old plumbing system. Six months later, their maintenance plan caught another weak joint before it failed.
— Marcus T.
